location.name: Mercado dos Lavradores
location.summary: Funchal’s traditional market for fruit, flowers, local produce and fresh fish.
location.imageAlt: Mercado dos Lavradores market in Funchal

article.intro: Mercado dos Lavradores is Funchal’s best-known traditional market, close to the Old Town and waterfront.
article.history: The market has long been a meeting point for local produce, flowers and fish, and remains one of the city’s most recognisable buildings.
highlights: Central location near Funchal Old Town
article.practicalTip: Check prices before buying fruit, especially items sold as samples to visitors.
